# Shahzaib Hassan - AI Automation Engineer

> Shahzaib Hassan is an AI Automation Engineer at Automaxion, based in Lahore, Pakistan. He builds workflow automations, AI agents, voice bots, and custom applications for businesses.

## About
Shahzaib transitioned from a pre-medical background to Artificial Intelligence, graduating with a 3.65 CGPA in BS AI from Islamia University of Bahawalpur. He was hired during his 7th semester before graduating. He co-founded the Neurafinity Club, taught 4 Python bootcamps, and served as a TA for AI courses.

## Services
- Workflow Automation: End-to-end business process automation using n8n, Make.com, and Zapier
- AI Voice Agents: Inbound/outbound voice bots using VAPI, Retell, and ElevenLabs
- Custom AI Applications: Full-stack apps with AI integration using Next.js, Python, and LLM APIs

## Key Projects
- [Autonomous Social Media System](https://shahzaibbuilds.me/#work): AI-driven social posting pipeline (Make.com, Airtable, AI APIs)
- [Cold Outreach Pipeline](https://shahzaibbuilds.me/#work): Personalized cold email at scale (Airtable, Make.com, Instantly)
- [Data Enrichment Dashboard](https://shahzaibbuilds.me/#work): Custom Next.js app with bespoke APIs
- [Psychological Assessment Platform](https://shahzaibbuilds.me/#work): Typeform + custom scoring + PDF reports + ActiveCampaign
- [AI Teaching Assistant for Long-Form Documents](https://shahzaibbuilds.me/#work): Document-to-interactive-slides with ElevenLabs voice narration

## Technical Stack
- Automation: n8n (expert), Make.com (expert), Zapier, Airtable, Instantly, ActiveCampaign
- Programming: Python (advanced), JavaScript/TypeScript, Next.js, React
- AI/ML: OpenAI, Claude, Mistral, CrewAI, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, OpenCV
- Voice AI: VAPI, Retell, Bland AI, ElevenLabs
- DevOps: Docker, Nginx, Linux/Ubuntu, AWS, Hetzner, DigitalOcean

## Blog
Technical articles on AI automation, n8n workflows, and building production systems.
- [Getting Started with n8n](https://shahzaibbuilds.me/blog/getting-started-with-n8n): Practical guide to setting up n8n and building your first automation
- [Blog Home](https://shahzaibbuilds.me/blog): All posts
- [RSS Feed](https://shahzaibbuilds.me/blog/rss.xml): Subscribe to new posts
